_comment: Abstraction-contract ratchet baseline. Counts hardcoded card-name conditionals in engine/+ai/. Ratcheted 8→7 on 2026-04-27 by tagging LEGENDARY supertype-enum check as abstraction-allow. Ratcheted 7→1 on 2026-05-02 by tagging cards with `storm_payoff` (oracle-derived from storm effect) and removing redundant name fallbacks where existing tags (etb_value, cantrip, card_advantage) already covered the listed cards; lifted Gifts-Ungiven sort key, Primeval-Titan land priority, and Phelia ETB filter to tag/oracle checks. Remaining 1 is Mox Opal mana-payment (intentional patch with explicit comment justifying name check). May only decrease. See CLAUDE.md ABSTRACTION CONTRACT.
_deck_gate_comment: Hardcoded deck-name gates in engine/+ai/. Same anti-pattern as card-name gates but for archetype detection — gating on a single deck name where a tag, oracle predicate, or per-archetype config (ai/strategy_profile.py / decks/gameplans/*.json) belongs. Class D from docs/design/2026-05-04_modern_combo_audit_methodology.md. Seeded 2026-05-04 at 0 (clean tree). May only decrease.
